sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61624" key="lai2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λαι-</orth>, <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λαισ-</orth>, insep. prefix with intens. sense (cf. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">λα</itype>-) in <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λαίμαργος, λαίσκαπρος, λαίσπαις</foreign>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λαΐα</orth>, <sense id="n61624.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">λᾴα</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
